summary: Test suite covers basic functionality (glob matching, priority ordering, deduplication, stdin/file input) but has critical gaps. MAJOR DEFICIENCY: The task explicitly requires 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' via a GitHub Actions workflow, yet this test suite contains ZERO workflow testing, ZERO ACT integration, and NO act-result.txt validation. Tests only exercise happy path and a single error case (missing rules file); missing rigorous edge case testing: malformed rules, non-numeric priorities, file paths with spaces/special chars, empty rules file, warning message validation. Design is reasonably clean with setup/teardown but lacks helper functions and uses fragile grep assertions. Would fail to catch input validation errors, malformed configuration handling, or CI/CD pipeline issues.
